title: [SBW] Wrecked!
description: Stops SuperbWarfare vehicles from evaporating after being destroyed!
body:
Got implemented into SuperbWarfare mod, it should NOT be used since version 0.8.9.
[SBW] Wrecked!

Wrecked! is a immersive addon for Superb Warfare that redefines vehicle destruction. No more disappearing tanks, every kill leaves something behind.

Persistent Battlefields

Destroyed vehicles no longer vanish when their health reaches zero. Instead, they turn into physical wrecks, creating lasting cover, obstacles, and battlefield scars that remain long after the fight is over.

The Cutter Tool

Introduces a dedicated cutting tool designed for wreck dismantling.
Slice through armor plates with immersive visual and sound effects.

Salvage & Scrap
Every wreck can be dismantled into iron, letting players recover resources from vehicle wrecks.
Dynamic Paint-Burn Visuals

Wrecks feature a custom render layer simulating burned-off paint, over the first few seconds after destruction, vehicles transition from their original colors to a scorched, blackened finish, visually selling the impact of the explosion.

Config-Based Control

Fully configurable to fit any server or modpack:

- Auto-cleanup system toggle
- Wreck lifetime
- Cutting speed
- Scrap drop rates
- Wreck system blacklist
